compressed_prompt: I work in the marketing department and I need your help. I need a template for an advertisement for a new product which is a portable camera. In the template, capitalize a few words to stress main points. Please limit the number of words with all capital letters to less than four. Your response should contain at least ten sentences.
response:
# Portable Camera Advertisement Template

---

Introducing the most exciting innovation in photography that you have ever seen. Our brand-new portable camera is designed for adventurers, travelers, and creative minds who refuse to miss a single moment. Whether you are hiking through mountains or exploring busy city streets, this camera is your perfect companion. It fits comfortably in your pocket, making it incredibly easy to carry wherever life takes you.

The image quality is absolutely STUNNING, delivering crystal-clear photos that will leave everyone speechless. With its advanced lens technology, every shot captures rich colors and sharp details that truly bring your memories to life. The camera also features an impressive battery life, ensuring you never run out of power during your most important moments. Its lightweight design means you will barely notice it in your bag or pocket throughout the day.

Connecting with friends and family has never been easier, as you can instantly share your photos through our dedicated mobile application. The setup process is remarkably simple, so you can start capturing beautiful images within minutes of opening the box. Our customer support team is available around the clock to assist you with any questions or concerns you may have. This camera is truly BUILT for people who demand both quality and convenience in one affordable package.

Do not wait any longer to elevate your photography experience. Order yours TODAY and start creating memories that will last a lifetime.
